message:
feat(compat): update tower bridge layer with test coverage

- asupersync-tokio-compat/src/tower_bridge.rs: Refine the compatibility
  bridge between asupersync's native service traits and Tower's Service
  trait, ensuring correct future pinning and error propagation.

- asupersync-tokio-compat/src/tower_bridge_test.rs: New test file verifying
  the bridge correctly adapts between the two service trait systems,
  including edge cases around poll_ready sequencing and error forwarding.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
